title: Citation Verification Summary
description: Results of verifying citing DOIs via Crossref to distinguish genuine third-party artifact citations from false positives (paper-level citations) and self-citations.

total_citing_dois_checked.description: Total number of citing DOIs that were verified via Crossref.

FALSE_POSITIVE.description: Citations that cited the paper, not the artifact (title confusion in OpenAlex).

SELF_CITATION.description: Citations by authors of the artifact itself.

UNKNOWN.description: Citations that could not be classified.

genuine_third_party_citations.description: Total count of genuine third-party artifact citations.

method.description: Description of the verification methodology used.

note.description: Additional context explaining the verification results.
